name: Chocolate Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 7 x 12-inch baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
3. Combine the ingredients in the order they appear on the list. Stir well until fully mixed.
4. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top springs back slightly when lightly pressed.
